﻿The Central Virginia Railroad, the Meadows in Greenbriar Co., and several other stations in Kanawha Co., and along the Baltimore and Ohio and Parkersburgh Railroad, are also attended occasionally.

﻿The Sisters have purchased a very beautiful site, embracing one hundred acres, distant about a mile and a half from town, on which they are erecting very spacious buildings for the accomodation of 200 pupils. They expect to occupy these buildings during the coming vacation, and to open them the next scholastic year.
